title: Cobblemon Battle Impactor
description: This mod let you earns money from impactor while defeating wild, trainer, npcs pokemon
body:
## 💰 Cobblemon Economy Expansion 💰

🎮 **Turn every battle into a reward!**  
This mod adds a **dynamic economy system** to **Cobblemon**, using **Impactor** to handle money rewards and penalties.

### ⚔️ Features
- 🐾 **Defeat wild Pokémon** → earn or lose money  
- 🧑‍🏫 **Beat NPC trainers** → balanced rewards  
- 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 **Player vs Player battles** → risk vs reward  

### 🔥 Why use this mod?
- 💎 More engaging progression  
- 📈 Living, configurable economy  
- ⚙️ Perfect for **RPG & survival servers**  
- 🔗 Seamless **Impactor integration**

> Every battle matters.  
> Every win (and loss) has a price. 💸🔥
